name: svg-factory
description: No-dependency SVG generation CLI with an installable Codex skill.

interface.shortDescription: Generate, validate, and preview editable SVG assets.
interface.longDescription: Adds an SVG Factory skill for generating polished vector assets, validating SVG definitions, rendering previews, and using bundled sheet presets.
defaultPrompt: Use SVG Factory to create an editable SVG asset.
Generate previews for the SVG sheet presets.
